description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push and pull request. The workflow should have three jobs: lint, build, and test. The lint job checks code formatting using black on ubuntu-latest. The build job sets up Python 3.10 on ubuntu-latest, installs build and twine, builds the package, checks it, and publishes it to PyPI if the push is tagged. The test job runs on a matrix of OS and Python versions, checking out the code, setting up Python, installing the package, and running diagnostics with ue4-docker.
